title: Cross-link to single-cell availability (ewing-single-cell-atlas)
context: Where single-cell data exists for a model in the sibling ewing-single-cell-atlas project, the catalog should cross-link to it (a reference, not a recomputation). This widens reuse without duplicating or moving data. Standing guardrails bind this task: open-access sources only (no dbGaP/EGA/biobank/controlled-access); COSMIC/OncoKB are link-only; donor fields are published-only with no re-identification or external linkage; every assertion carries field-level provenance; the deliverable is de-identified research metadata, never patient data and never a clinical/therapeutic recommendation.
objective: Cross-link catalogued models to single-cell availability in ewing-single-cell-atlas (reference only, no recompute).
acceptanceCriteria: For each catalogued model with single-cell data in ewing-single-cell-atlas, a provenanced cross-link (not a copy) is recorded.
No single-cell data is recomputed or re-hosted; only references/links are stored.
Cross-links validate in CI; deliverable dataset licensed CC-BY-4.0.
resources: ICLAC Register of Misidentified Cell Lines
